title: New trailer
wikitext:
[]: New trailer             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 10:56 am So the official site just posted a new trailer (or maybe the old one?); it's not viewable in the US. Maybe the rest of you will have better luck. http://www.evangelion.co.jp/trailer.html

[]:             Quote Post by lo zaffo » Fri Jul 27, 2012 11:06 am Did anybody see it? Please check it soon.

[]:             Quote Post by tomfrom994 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 11:12 am O.O I tried a proxy, and all I got out of it was a video player that wouldn't load. And also, this embed code for the video: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 11:44 am C'mon Japan surely someone can help us desperate north American and Europian fans

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 12:00 pm From comments I have found on twitter here and there, it sounds like it's just a longer version of the piano-playing.

[]:             Quote Post by tomfrom994 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 12:01 pm SOMETHING: Judging by this snapshot, Anno might be revealing a bit too much about what happens in 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by PolarisX » Fri Jul 27, 2012 12:09 pm tomfrom994 wrote: SOMETHING: Judging by this snapshot, Anno might be revealing a bit too much about what happens in 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by tomfrom994 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 12:11 pm PolarisX wrote: 404 Error.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 27, 2012 12:43 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by tomfrom994 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 12:49 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Watch your back; this fandom is fucking crazy.

[]:             Quote Post by Wunderbar » Fri Jul 27, 2012 1:26 pm JoeD80 wrote: From comments I have found on twitter here and there, it sounds like it's just a longer version of the piano-playing.

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Fri Jul 27, 2012 3:04 pm I want there to be a version that plays the Athletic Theme from Super Mario World.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 3:35 pm Brainman wrote: I want there to be a version that plays the Athletic Theme from Super Mario World.

[]:             Quote Post by Josh_LawLiet » Fri Jul 27, 2012 3:50 pm I noticed about that i will try with all my inet knowledge

[]:             Quote Post by tomfrom994 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 4:41 pm I've been messing around with proxies for the last hour. Any proxy that allows me to see the video player will allow me to click play, say "Now Loading..." for about 10-20 seconds, and then the player disappears and some message appears. (The message isn't the "this service is not available in your country" one; it's all in Japanese and it makes the player's interface disappear). What do?

[]:             Quote Post by Sceleris » Fri Jul 27, 2012 5:28 pm tomfrom994: "映像配信サーバへの接続がタイムアウトになりました。しばらくしてから、再度お試しください。"? Just your ordinary "the content server has timed out" message. I got the SMIL "playlist" file, so I've been trying to dump the streams with rtmpdump, but no dice. Don't know if I need a newer version, maybe even an older version, if I've gotten the URL parsed right, or if I have to call the server in another way (for authorization, like tacking on a session ID or including the calling web page). If someone else feels like trying, the meta base is rtmpe://fmsjp.b-ch.com/ondemand/flash while the video source is live/pv/P_025841_1500.mp4 . (And the player is http://flwww.b-ch.com/jpn/live/player/050110.swf .) But why bother? Someone'll get it up on YouTube or Nico soon enough. Maybe someone who doesn't have to fiddle with proxies. :V

[]:             Quote Post by Josh_LawLiet » Fri Jul 27, 2012 6:22 pm Maybe there's a mismatch with the handshake version used by your rtmpdump and server's one Sometime ago I got a problem like that and changing to a newer version were the solution. (But downgrade version if the handshake supported is lower that which you use).

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 27, 2012 6:45 pm Apparently that piano BGM title is 「Quatre Mains(bande-annonce)」according to Minna No Eva Fan: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1702.html I found a (supposedly crappy version) of the trailer while Googling; still in the process of downloading it. EDIT: Trailer/preview I found was the Space Pirate Asuka one. Meh. But from what I've read online, it's just an extended version of the piano trailer. I'm assuming somebody will upload the trailer to Youtube or Nico soon enough.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri Jul 27, 2012 9:28 pm Meh... More ambiguous piano? Where's the "Fly me to the moon" trailer!?

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Fri Jul 27, 2012 11:58 pm info bump please?
